summary: Classified the ten PR-inventory seed refs independently using the hydrated preflight artifact and deterministic validation result. No shared canonical is selected for this mixed inventory shard. Open non-security PRs remain non-mutating classifications; closed seed PRs are retained as skipped historical context; #90617 and #90819 are routed as exact security-sensitive items. No merge, fix PR, post-merge close, or instant close is planned because the job blocks merge/fix/raise_pr and instant close is disabled in the fix artifact permissions.
